assessments.title: Intelligence gaps: 10 blind spots active
assessments.analysis: 10 sources returned no data: gdelt, metaculus, acled, ioda, fred, safecast, think_tanks, official_feeds, fema, eia. IODA (internet outage) data unavailable.cannot detect blackouts that precede political crises. These gaps reduce confidence in all other assessments that would cross-reference these sources.
hypotheses: GDELT gap: No global news feed = blind to breaking events. Cannot cross-reference military or economic signals with news coverage.
FRED gap: No economic indicators = cannot confirm or deny recession/inflation signals from commodity moves.
watch_for: If multiple sources fail simultaneously, check if it's network-wide (your connection) vs source-specific (their API)
Prolonged GDELT outage = check alternative news APIs
ADS-B silence could mean tracking is being deliberately suppressed.itself a signal
assessments.business_angle: Military/security events create uncertainty.businesses freeze hiring and expand automation. Position BOSS as the stable, cost-cutting option.

assessments.title: Market Intelligence: 151 edges across 5 countries, top edge 14.1pp
assessments.analysis: Paper trader analyzed 311 markets, found 151 edges. Largest edge: 'US-Iran 60 day negotiation period extended?'.market 62.5% vs ATLAS 48.4% (14.1pp edge). Geopolitical hotspots by market attention: US, RO, IR, RU, CN. Information gaps identified: US strike on Cuba by December 31?; Will Malcolm Kenyatta be the next Chair ; Will Alexandru Nazare be the next Prime .ATLAS should prioritize these regions next scan.
hypotheses: HYPOTHESIS A: Markets consistently overpricing peace/diplomacy outcomes.adversarial base rates suggest NO bets have structural edge
HYPOTHESIS B: Markets underpricing conflict escalation.ATLAS sensors (GDELT, ADS-B, think tanks) see more activity than markets reflect
HYPOTHESIS D: 10 markets have zero relevant news.these are either non-events or black holes where information isn't reaching open sources
watch_for: Edge convergence: if market moves toward ATLAS position, confirms our analysis
New prediction market listings on hotspot countries.fresh liquidity = fresh edge
Breaking news from RO, KE, CU.fills information gaps and may move markets sharply
assessments.business_angle: Market intelligence reveals global stress patterns. Countries with high market attention = news-cycle-driven anxiety = businesses more receptive to 'protect your revenue' pitch.

Слухи оперативно  опровергла  официальный представитель МИД России Мария Захарова, но иноагентов и нежелательные организации было уже не остановить.
